vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (thứ gì đó mới mẻ và thú vị)
vocab.example: Building a new park in this crowded district would be a breath of fresh air for all the residents.

vocab.meaning: linh hồn của (một nơi nào đó, sự náo nhiệt)
vocab.example: Public squares are often the life and soul of a city, where culture and community spirit truly thrive.

vocab.meaning: rất gần, chỉ cách một đoạn ngắn
vocab.example: I believe everyone should have a green space within a stone's throw from their front door.
In my neighborhood, decent public libraries are few and far between, which is quite a shame.

vocab.meaning: là phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Access to communal spaces is part and parcel of a high quality of life in any modern metropolis.
Open spaces are currently at a premium in this city, so the government must prioritize land for parks.

vocab.meaning: mang lại kết quả tuyệt vời cho cái gì
vocab.example: Adding more botanical gardens would do wonders for the mental health of city dwellers.

vocab.meaning: thành phố toàn bê tông (thiếu mảng xanh)
vocab.example: I don't want my hometown to turn into a concrete jungle; we need more squares and trees.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi mọi áp lực, mệt mỏi
vocab.example: Local residents need more public gardens where they can go to get away from it all after a stressful workday.

vocab.meaning: nơi giao thoa của nhiều nền văn hóa/con người
vocab.example: A central plaza would serve as a melting pot where people from all walks of life can gather and interact.
